## Acceptance Criteria

This task is complete when:

```text
[ ] The required files are created.
[ ] The folder structure follows project standards.
[ ] Documentation is clear.
[ ] No secrets are committed.
[ ] No deployment is performed.
[ ] GitHub-first project strategy is followed.
[ ] Related documents are updated if needed.
[ ] The task can be reviewed by someone seeing the project for the first time.
```

## Execution Status

This project is currently following a GitHub-first approach.

Select one:

```text
[ ] Design/documentation only
[ ] Code/configuration only
[ ] Validation only
[ ] Execution planned for later
[ ] Execution performed
```

For the current phase, most tasks should be:

```text
Design/documentation only
```

or

```text
Code/configuration only
```
